name: Elbmesh Check Architecture Boundaries
title: Check Elbmesh Architecture Boundaries
summary: Verify an Elbmesh change against Resource, Action, Event, Reaction, External Operation, View, Query, journal, manifest, schema, and docs synchronization rules.
description: Use this task before completion or review when a change needs an explicit architecture pass/fail summary and missing-check report.

validations.title: Architecture boundary review
passCriteria: The output starts with pass/fail status and findings ordered by severity.
Every relevant Action, Event, Reaction, External Operation, View, Query, journal, and manifest boundary is checked.
Missing automated checks and required docs/tests updates are listed explicitly.

items: Read docs/GOAL.md, docs/GLOSSARY.md, docs/DEVELOPMENT_WORKFLOW.md, docs/PHASED_DELIVERY_PLAN.md, docs/AGENT_SKILLS.md, relevant ADRs, changed files, and PPP boundary guidance.
Check each Action targets exactly one Resource and each Event belongs to exactly one Resource stream.
Check Action handler uniqueness, Event apply/replay coverage, deterministic replay, and absence of external calls from replay/apply code where those surfaces are present.
Check execution failures go to typed errors or journals unless explicitly modeled as domain Events.
Check Reactions invoke Actions, Views derive from Events and are rebuildable, and external calls use declared External Operations.
Check schemas, capability docs, PPP task guidance, and the central PPP route map stay in sync with manifest/docs changes.
Docs or tests that must be updated
